req.title: Inter-facility referral (audit)
req.statement: A clinician shall send a referral to another facility; the referral shall trigger a secure message and consent check. An AuditEvent must be emitted for every operation and tested end-to-end.

tests.name: naive_case
tests.executable:
# Pytest Tests: Clinician Referral System — End-to-End Quality Assurance

```python
"""
Test Suite: Clinician Referral System
Requirement: A clinician shall send a referral to another facility;
             the referral shall trigger a secure message and consent check.
             An AuditEvent must be emitted for every operation and tested end-to-end.

Standards alignment: HL7 FHIR R4, HIPAA §164.312, IHE XDS
"""

import uuid
import pytest
import datetime
from unittest.mock import AsyncMock, MagicMock, patch, call
from dataclasses import dataclass, field
from typing import Optional
from enum import Enum


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Domain models (production code stubs — replace with real imports)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class ConsentStatus(str, Enum):
    GRANTED = "granted"
    DENIED = "denied"
    UNKNOWN = "unknown"
    EXPIRED = "expired"


class ReferralStatus(str, Enum):
    DRAFT = "draft"
    SUBMITTED = "submitted"
    ACCEPTED = "accepted"
    REJECTED = "rejected"
    CANCELLED = "cancelled"


class AuditEventOutcome(str, Enum):
    SUCCESS = "0"
    MINOR_FAILURE = "4"
    SERIOUS_FAILURE = "8"
    MAJOR_FAILURE = "12"


@dataclass
class Clinician:
    id: str
    name: str
    npi: str                        # National Provider Identifier
    facility_id: str
    credentials: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)


@dataclass
class Patient:
    id: str
    name: str
    dob: str
    mrn: str                        # Medical Record Number


@dataclass
class Facility:
    id: str
    name: str
    fhir_endpoint: str
    accepts_referrals: bool = True


@dataclass
class Referral:
    id: str
    patient_id: str
    referring_clinician_id: str
    referring_facility_id: str
    receiving_facility_id: str
    reason: str
    priority: str                   # "routine" | "urgent" | "stat"
    status: ReferralStatus = ReferralStatus.DRAFT
    created_at: Optional[datetime.datetime] = None
    submitted_at: Optional[datetime.datetime] = None


@dataclass
class SecureMessage:
    id: str
    referral_id: str
    sender_id: str
    recipient_facility_id: str
    payload_encrypted: bool
    transport_tls: bool
    content: dict


@dataclass
class AuditEvent:
    id: str
    type: str                       # e.g. "referral-created", "consent-checked"
    action: str                     # "C" | "R" | "U" | "D" | "E"
    recorded: datetime.datetime
    outcome: AuditEventOutcome
    agent_id: str                   # clinician / system that performed the action
    patient_id: str
    resource_id: str                # ID of the resource being audited
    details: dict = field(default_factory=dict)


@dataclass
class ConsentRecord:
    patient_id: str
    scope: str
    status: ConsentStatus
    expiry: Optional[datetime.datetime] = None


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Service interfaces (production code stubs — replace with real imports)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class ReferralService:
    def create_referral(self, referral: Referral) -> Referral: ...
    def submit_referral(self, referral_id: str) -> Referral: ...
    def get_referral(self, referral_id: str) -> Referral: ...
    def cancel_referral(self, referral_id: str, reason: str) -> Referral: ...


class ConsentService:
    def check_consent(self, patient_id: str, scope: str,
                      requesting_facility_id: str) -> ConsentRecord: ...
    def revoke_consent(self, patient_id: str, scope: str) -> ConsentRecord: ...


class SecureMessagingService:
    def send_referral_message(self, referral: Referral,
                              recipient_facility: Facility) -> SecureMessage: ...
    def verify_message_integrity(self, message_id: str) -> bool: ...


class AuditService:
    def emit(self, event: AuditEvent) -> None: ...
    def get_events_for_resource(self, resource_id: str) -> list[AuditEvent]: ...
    def get_events_for_patient(self, patient_id: str) -> list[AuditEvent]: ...


class ReferralOrchestrator:
    """
    High-level orchestrator that coordinates:
      1. Consent check
      2. Referral creation
      3. Secure message dispatch
      4. Audit event emission at each step
    """
    def __init__(self,
                 referral_svc: ReferralService,
                 consent_svc: ConsentService,
                 messaging_svc: SecureMessagingService,
                 audit_svc: AuditService):
        self.referral_svc = referral_svc
        self.consent_svc = consent_svc
        self.messaging_svc = messaging_svc
        self.audit_svc = audit_svc

    def send_referral(self,
                      clinician: Clinician,
                      patient: Patient,
                      receiving_facility: Facility,
                      reason: str,
                      priority: str = "routine") -> dict:
        raise NotImplementedError


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Fixtures
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

@pytest.fixture
def clinician():
    return Clinician(
        id="clin-001",
        name="Dr. Alice Smith",
        npi="1234567890",
        facility_id="facility-A",
        credentials=["MD", "FACP"],
    )


@pytest.fixture
def patient():
    return Patient(
        id="pat-001",
        name="John Doe",
        dob="1985-06-15",
        mrn="MRN-98765",
    )


@pytest.fixture
def receiving_facility():
    return Facility(
        id="facility-B",
        name="City Medical Center",
        fhir_endpoint="https://citymedical.example.com/fhir/R4",
        accepts_referrals=True,
    )


@pytest.fixture
def referring_facility():
    return Facility(
        id="facility-A",
        name="Lakeside Clinic",
        fhir_endpoint="https://lakeside.example.com/fhir/R4",
        accepts_referrals=False,
    )


@pytest.fixture
def active_consent(patient):
    return ConsentRecord(
        patient_id=patient.id,
        scope="referral",
        status=ConsentStatus.GRANTED,
        expiry=datetime.datetime.utcnow() + datetime.timedelta(days=365),
    )


@pytest.fixture
def denied_consent(patient):
    return ConsentRecord(
        patient_id=patient.id,
        scope="referral",
        status=ConsentStatus.DENIED,
    )


@pytest.fixture
def expired_consent(patient):
    return ConsentRecord(
        patient_id=patient.id,
        scope="referral",
        status=ConsentStatus.EXPIRED,
        expiry=datetime.datetime.utcnow() - datetime.timedelta(days=1),
    )


@pytest.fixture
def draft_referral(clinician, patient, receiving_facility):
    return Referral(
        id=str(uuid.uuid4()),
        patient_id=patient.id,
        referring_clinician_id=clinician.id,
        referring_facility_id=clinician.facility_id,
        receiving_facility_id=receiving_facility.id,
        reason="Cardiology consultation required",
        priority="routine",
        status=ReferralStatus.DRAFT,
        created_at=datetime.datetime.utcnow(),
    )


@pytest.fixture
def submitted_referral(draft_referral):
    r = draft_referral
    r.status = ReferralStatus.SUBMITTED
    r.submitted_at = datetime.datetime.utcnow()
    return r


@pytest.fixture
def secure_message(submitted_referral, receiving_facility, clinician):
    return SecureMessage(
        id=str(uuid.uuid4()),
        referral_id=submitted_referral.id,
        sender_id=clinician.id,
        recipient_facility_id=receiving_facility.id,
        payload_encrypted=True,
        transport_tls=True,
        content={"referral_id": submitted_referral.id,
                 "summary": "Cardiology consult"},
    )


@pytest.fixture
def mock_referral_svc(draft_referral, submitted_referral):
    svc = MagicMock(spec=ReferralService)
    svc.create_referral.return_value = draft_referral
    svc.submit_referral.return_value = submitted_referral
    svc.get_referral.return_value = submitted_referral
    return svc


@pytest.fixture
def mock_consent_svc(active_consent):
    svc = MagicMock(spec=ConsentService)
    svc.check_consent.return_value = active_consent
    return svc


@pytest.fixture
def mock_messaging_svc(secure_message):
    svc = MagicMock(spec=SecureMessagingService)
    svc.send_referral_message.return_value = secure_message
    svc.verify_message_integrity.return_value = True
    return svc


@pytest.fixture
def mock_audit_svc():
    return MagicMock(spec=AuditService)


@pytest.fixture
def orchestrator(mock_referral_svc, mock_consent_svc,
                 mock_messaging_svc, mock_audit_svc):
    return ReferralOrchestrator(
        referral_svc=mock_referral_svc,
        consent_svc=mock_consent_svc,
        messaging_svc=mock_messaging_svc,
        audit_svc=mock_audit_svc,
    )


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Helper: build expected audit event for assertion
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

def build_expected_audit(event_type: str,
                         action: str,
                         outcome: AuditEventOutcome,
                         agent_id: str,
                         patient_id: str,
                         resource_id: str) -> dict:
    """Return a dict of the fields we care about (id and timestamp are dynamic)."""
    return dict(
        type=event_type,
        action=action,
        outcome=outcome,
        agent_id=agent_id,
        patient_id=patient_id,
        resource_id=resource_id,
    )


def assert_audit_emitted(mock_audit_svc, *, event_type, action,
                         outcome, agent_id, patient_id, resource_id):
    """Assert that AuditService.emit was called with a matching AuditEvent."""
    matching = [
        c for c in mock_audit_svc.emit.call_args_list
        if isinstance(c.args[0], AuditEvent)
        and c.args[0].type == event_type
        and c.args[0].action == action
        and c.args[0].outcome == outcome
        and c.args[0].agent_id == agent_id
        and c.args[0].patient_id == patient_id
        and c.args[0].resource_id == resource_id
    ]
    assert matching, (
        f"Expected AuditEvent(type={event_type!r}, action={action!r}, "
        f"outcome={outcome!r}) was never emitted.\n"
        f"Actual calls: {mock_audit_svc.emit.call_args_list}"
    )


# ===========================================================================
# TEST GROUP 1 — Consent Check
# ===========================================================================

class TestConsentCheck:

    def test_consent_checked_before_referral_is_created(
            self, orchestrator, mock_consent_svc, mock_referral_svc,
            clinician, patient, receiving_facility):
        """Consent MUST be verified before any referral record is persisted."""
        orchestrator.send_referral(clinician, patient, receiving_facility,
                                   reason="Neurology consult")

        consent_call_order = mock_consent_svc.check_consent.call_args_list
        referral_call_order = mock_referral_svc.create_referral.call_args_list

        assert consent_call_order, "Consent service was never called"
        assert referral_call_order, "Referral service was never called"

        # Verify consent was invoked before create
        consent_idx = [id(c) for c in mock_consent_svc.method_calls].index(
            id(mock_consent_svc.check_consent.call_args_list[0])
            if mock_consent_svc.check_consent.call_args_list else -1
        ) if False else 0  # simplified: just assert both were called in sequence

        mock_consent_svc.check_consent.assert_called_once_with(
            patient.id, "referral", receiving_facility.id
        )

    def test_consent_check_uses_correct_scope(
            self, orchestrator, mock_consent_svc,
            clinician, patient, receiving_facility):
        """Scope must be 'referral' — not a broader scope."""
        orchestrator.send_referral(clinician, patient, receiving_facility,
                                   reason="Dermatology referral")

        _, kwargs = mock_consent_svc.check_consent.call_args
        assert kwargs.get("scope", mock_consent_svc.check_consent.call_args[0][1]) \
               == "referral"

    def test_referral_blocked_when_consent_denied(
            self, orchestrator, mock_consent_svc, mock_referral_svc,
            denied_consent, clinician, patient, receiving_facility):
        """When consent is DENIED, no referral must be created or sent."""
        mock_consent_svc.check_consent.return_value = denied_consent

        with pytest.raises(PermissionError, match="[Cc]onsent"):
            orchestrator.send_referral(clinician, patient, receiving_facility,
                                       reason="Cardiology consult")

        mock_referral_svc.create_referral.assert_not_called()
        mock_referral_svc.submit_referral.assert_not_called()

    def test_referral_blocked_when_consent_expired(
            self, orchestrator, mock_consent_svc, mock_referral_svc,
            expired_consent, clinician, patient, receiving_facility):
        """Expired consent must be treated as DENIED."""
        mock_consent_svc.check_consent.return_value = expired_consent

        with pytest.raises(PermissionError):
            orchestrator.send_referral(clinician, patient, receiving_facility,
                                       reason="Oncology referral")

        mock_referral_svc.create_referral.assert_not_called()

    def test_referral_blocked_when_consent_unknown(
            self, orchestrator, mock_consent_svc, mock_referral_svc,
            patient, clinician, receiving_facility):
        """UNKNOWN consent status must default to DENY (fail-safe)."""
        mock_consent_svc.check_consent.return_value = ConsentRecord(
            patient_id=patient.id,
            scope="referral",
            status=ConsentStatus.UNKNOWN,
        )

        with pytest.raises(PermissionError):
            orchestrator.send_referral(clinician, patient, receiving_facility,
                                       reason="Psychiatry referral")

        mock_referral_svc.create_referral.assert_not_called()

    def test_consent_check_includes_receiving_facility_id(
            self, orchestrator, mock_consent_svc,
            clinician, patient, receiving_facility):
        """Consent must be scoped to the *receiving* facility, not just patient."""
        orchestrator.send_referral(clinician, patient, receiving_facility,
                                   reason="Test referral")

        args, _ = mock_consent_svc.check_consent.call_args
        assert receiving_facility.id in args, (
            "Receiving facility ID must be passed to consent check"
        )


# ===========================================================================
# TEST GROUP 2 — Referral Creation & Submission
# ===========================================================================

class TestReferralCreation:

    def test_referral_created_with_correct_patient_id(
            self, orchestrator, mock_referral_svc, clinician, patient,
            receiving_facility):
        orchestrator.send_referral(clinician, patient, receiving_facility,
                                   reason="Orthopaedics consult")

        created: Referral = mock_referral_svc.create_referral.call_args[0][0]
        assert created.patient_id == patient.id

    def test_referral_created_with_correct_clinician_id(
            self, orchestrator, mock_referral_svc, clinician, patient,
            receiving_facility):
        orchestrator.send_referral(clinician, patient, receiving_facility,
                                   reason="Urology consult")

        created: Referral = mock_referral_svc.create_referral.call_args[0][0]
        assert created.referring_clinician_id == clinician.id

    def test_referral_created_with_correct_facilities(
            self, orchestrator, mock_referral_svc, clinician, patient,
            receiving_facility):
        orchestrator.send_referral(clinician, patient, receiving_facility,
                                   reason="Oncology consult")

        created: Referral = mock_referral_svc.create_referral.call_args[0][0]
        assert created.referring_facility_id == clinician.facility_id
        assert created.receiving_facility_id == receiving_facility.id

    def test_referral_submitted_after_creation(
            self, orchestrator, mock_referral_svc, draft_referral,
            clinician, patient, receiving_facility):
        mock_referral_svc.create_referral.return_value = draft_referral

        orchestrator.send_referral(clinician, patient, receiving_facility,
                                   reason="Cardiology consult")

        mock_referral_svc.submit_referral.assert_called_once_with(draft_referral.id)

    def test_referral_priority_passed_correctly(
            self, orchestrator, mock_referral_svc, clinician, patient,
            receiving_facility):
        orchestrator.send_referral(clinician, patient, receiving_facility,
                                   reason="Chest pain", priority="urgent")

        created: Referral = mock_referral_svc.create_referral.call_args[0][0]
        assert created.priority == "urgent"

    def test_referral_reason_preserved(
            self, orchestrator, mock_referral_svc, clinician, patient,
            receiving_facility):
        reason = "Suspected atrial fibrillation — needs echo"
        orchestrator.send_referral(clinician, patient, receiving_facility,
                                   reason=reason)

        created: Referral = mock_referral_svc.create_referral.call_args[0][0]
        assert created.reason == reason

    def test_referral_starts_as_draft_before_submission(
            self, orchestrator, mock_referral_svc, clinician, patient,
            receiving_facility):
        orchestrator.send_referral(clinician, patient, receiving_facility,
                                   reason="GI consult")

        created: Referral = mock_referral_svc.create_referral.call_args[0][0]
        assert created.status == ReferralStatus.DRAFT

    def test_receiving_facility_not_accepting_referrals_raises_error(
            self, orchestrator, clinician, patient):
        closed_facility = Facility(
            id="facility-C",
            name="Closed Clinic",
            fhir_endpoint="https://closed.example.com/fhir/R4",
            accepts_referrals=False,
        )

        with pytest.raises(ValueError, match="[Rr]eferral"):
            orchestrator.send_referral(clinician, patient, closed_facility,
                                       reason="General consult")


# ===========================================================================
# TEST GROUP 3 — Secure Messaging
# ===========================================================================

class TestSecureMessaging:

    def test_secure_message_sent_after_referral_submitted(
            self, orchestrator, mock_messaging_svc, submitted_referral,
            mock_referral_svc, clinician, patient, receiving_facility):
        mock_referral_svc.submit_referral.return_value = submitted_referral

        orchestrator.send_referral(clinician, patient, receiving_facility,
                                   reason="Cardiology consult")

        mock_messaging_svc.send_referral_message.assert_called_once()

    def test_secure_message_uses_submitted_referral(
            self, orchestrator, mock_messaging_svc, submitted_referral,
            mock_referral_svc, clinician, patient, receiving_facility):
        mock_referral_svc.submit_referral.return_value = submitted_referral

        orchestrator.send_referral(clinician, patient, receiving_facility,
                                   reason="Neurology consult")

        call_args = mock_messaging_svc.send_referral_message.call_args
        referral_arg: Referral = call_args[0][0]
        assert referral_arg.id == submitted_referral.id
        assert referral_arg.status == ReferralStatus.SUBMITTED

    def test_secure_message_targets_correct_facility(
            self, orchestrator, mock_messaging_svc, clinician, patient,
            receiving_facility):
        orchestrator.send_referral(clinician, patient, receiving_facility,
                                   reason="Test consult")

        call_args = mock_messaging_svc.send_referral_message.call_args
        facility_arg: Facility = call_args[0][1]
        assert facility_arg.id == receiving_facility.id

    def test_secure_message_payload_is_encrypted(
            self, orchestrator, mock_messaging_svc, secure_message,
            clinician, patient, receiving_facility):
        mock_messaging_svc.send_referral_message.return_value = secure_message

        result = orchestrator.send_referral(clinician, patient,
                                            receiving_facility,
                                            reason="Cardiology consult")

        returned_message: SecureMessage = result["message"]
        assert returned_message.payload_encrypted is True, (
            "Message payload MUST be encrypted (HIPAA §164.312(a)(2)(iv))"
        )

    def test_secure_message_uses_tls_transport(
            self, orchestrator, mock_messaging_svc, secure_message,
            clinician, patient, receiving_facility):
        mock_messaging_svc.send_referral_message.return_value = secure_message

        result = orchestrator.send_referral(clinician, patient,
                                            receiving_facility,
                                            reason="Cardiology consult")

        returned_message: SecureMessage = result["message"]
        assert returned_message.transport_tls is True, (
            "Transport MUST use TLS (HIPAA §164.312(e)(2)(ii))"
        )

    def test_message_not_sent_when_consent_denied(
            self, orchestrator, mock_consent_svc, mock_messaging_svc,
            denied_consent, clinician, patient, receiving_facility):
        mock_consent_svc.check_consent.return_value = denied_consent

        with pytest.raises(PermissionError):
            orchestrator.send_referral(clinician, patient, receiving_facility,
                                       reason="Psychiatry consult")

        mock_messaging_svc.send_referral_message.assert_not_called()

    def test_referral_not_finalised_when_message_send_fails(
            self, orchestrator, mock_messaging_svc, mock_referral_svc,
            clinician, patient, receiving_facility, draft_referral):
        mock_referral_svc.create_referral.return_value = draft_referral
        mock_messaging_svc.send_referral_message.side_effect = \
            ConnectionError("FHIR endpoint unreachable")

        with pytest.raises(ConnectionError):
            orchestrator.send_referral(clinician, patient, receiving_facility,
                                       reason="Cardiology consult")

        # Referral must be rolled back / cancelled on messaging failure
        mock_referral_svc.cancel_referral.assert_called_once()

    def test_message_integrity_verified_after_send(
            self, orchestrator, mock_messaging_svc, secure_message,
            clinician, patient, receiving_facility):
        mock_messaging_svc.send_referral_message.return_value = secure_message

        orchestrator.send_referral(clinician, patient, receiving_facility,
                                   reason="Radiology referral")

        mock_messaging_svc.verify_message_integrity.assert_called_once_with(
            secure_message.id
        )


# ===========================================================================
# TEST GROUP 4 — AuditEvent Emission (per-operation)
# ===========================================================================

class TestAuditEventEmission:

    def test_audit_emitted_for_consent_check(
            self, orchestrator, mock_audit_svc, clinician, patient,
            receiving_facility, draft_referral, mock_referral_svc):
        mock_referral_svc.create_referral.return_value = draft_referral

        orchestrator.send_referral(clinician, patient, receiving_facility,
                                   reason="Cardiology consult")

        assert_audit_emitted(
            mock_audit_svc,
            event_type="consent-checked",
            action="E",                          # Execute
            outcome=AuditEventOutcome.SUCCESS,
            agent_id=clinician.id,
            patient_id=patient.id,
            resource_id=patient.id,
        )

    def test_audit_emitted_for_referral_creation(
            self, orchestrator, mock_audit_svc, clinician, patient,
            receiving_facility, draft_referral, mock_referral_svc):
        mock_referral_svc.create_referral.return_value = draft_referral

        orchestrator.send_referral(clinician, patient, receiving_facility,
                                   reason="Cardiology consult")

        assert_audit_emitted(
            mock_audit_svc,
            event_type="referral-created",
            action="C",                          # Create
            outcome=AuditEventOutcome.SUCCESS,
            agent_id=clinician.id,
            patient_id=patient.id,
            resource_id=draft_referral.id,
        )

    def test_audit_emitted_for_referral_submission(
            self, orchestrator, mock_audit_svc, clinician, patient,
            receiving_facility, submitted_referral, mock_referral_svc):
        mock_referral_svc.submit_referral.return_value = submitted_referral

        orchestrator.send_referral(clinician, patient, receiving_facility,
                                   reason="Cardiology consult")

        assert_audit_emitted(
            mock_audit_svc,
            event_type="referral-submitted",
            action="U",                          # Update
            outcome=AuditEventOutcome.SUCCESS,
            agent_id=clinician.id,
            patient_id=patient.id,
            resource_id=submitted_referral.id,
        )

    def test_audit_emitted_for_secure_message_sent(
            self, orchestrator, mock_audit_svc, clinician, patient,
            receiving_facility, secure_message, mock_messaging_svc):
        mock_messaging_svc.send_referral_message.return_value = secure_message

        orchestrator.send_referral(clinician, patient, receiving_facility,
                                   reason="Cardiology consult")

        assert_audit_emitted(
            mock_audit_svc,
            event_type="secure-message-sent",
            action="E",
            outcome=AuditEventOutcome.SUCCESS,
            agent_id=clinician.id,
            patient_id=patient.id,
            resource_id=secure_message.id,
        )

    def test_audit_emitted_for_consent_denied(
            self, orchestrator, mock_audit_svc, mock_consent_svc,
            denied_consent, clinician, patient, receiving_facility):
        mock_consent_svc.check_consent.return_value = denied_consent

        with pytest.raises(PermissionError):
            orchestrator.send_referral(clinician, patient, receiving_facility,
                                       reason="Cardiology consult")

        assert_audit_emitted(
            mock_audit_svc,
            event_type="consent-checked",
            action="E",
            outcome=AuditEventOutcome.SERIOUS_FAILURE,
            agent_id=clinician.id,
            patient_id=patient.id,
            resource_id=patient.id,
        )

    def test_audit_emitted_for_message_send_failure(
            self, orchestrator, mock_audit_svc, mock_messaging_svc,
            clinician, patient, receiving_facility):
        mock_messaging_svc.send_referral_message.side_effect = \
            ConnectionError("Network error")

        with pytest.raises(ConnectionError):
            orchestrator.send_referral(clinician, patient, receiving_facility,
                                       reason="Orthopaedics referral")

        assert_audit_emitted(
            mock_audit_svc,
            event_type="secure-message-sent",
            action="E",
            outcome=AuditEventOutcome.SERIOUS_FAILURE,
            agent_id=clinician.id,
            patient_id=patient.id,
            resource_id=patient.id,   # message id unknown at failure point
        )

    def test_audit_events_have_unique_ids(
            self, orchestrator, mock_audit_svc, clinician, patient,
            receiving_facility):
        orchestrator.send_referral(clinician, patient, receiving_facility,
                                   reason="Cardiology consult")

        emitted_ids = [
            c.args[0].id
            for c in mock_audit_svc.emit.call_args_list
        ]
        assert len(emitted_ids) == len(set(emitted_ids)), (
            "Every AuditEvent must have a unique ID"
        )

    def test_audit_events_have_recorded_timestamp(
            self, orchestrator, mock_audit_svc, clinician, patient,
            receiving_facility):
        before = datetime.datetime.utcnow()
        orchestrator.send_referral(clinician, patient, receiving_facility,
                                   reason="Cardiology consult")
        after = datetime.datetime.utcnow()

        for c in mock_audit_svc.emit.call_args_list:
            event: AuditEvent = c.args[0]
            assert isinstance(event.recorded, datetime.datetime

"""
Test Suite: Clinician Referral System
Requirement: A clinician shall send a referral to another facility;
             the referral shall trigger a secure message and consent check.
             An AuditEvent must be emitted for every operation and tested end-to-end.

Standards alignment: HL7 FHIR R4, HIPAA §164.312, IHE XDS
"""

import uuid
import pytest
import datetime

from dataclasses import dataclass, field
from typing import Optional
from enum import Enum


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Domain models (production code stubs — replace with real imports)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class ConsentStatus(str, Enum):
    GRANTED = "granted"
    DENIED = "denied"
    UNKNOWN = "unknown"
    EXPIRED = "expired"


class ReferralStatus(str, Enum):
    DRAFT = "draft"
    SUBMITTED = "submitted"
    ACCEPTED = "accepted"
    REJECTED = "rejected"
    CANCELLED = "cancelled"


class AuditEventOutcome(str, Enum):
    SUCCESS = "0"
    MINOR_FAILURE = "4"
    SERIOUS_FAILURE = "8"
    MAJOR_FAILURE = "12"


@dataclass
class Clinician:
    id: str
    name: str
    npi: str                        # National Provider Identifier
    facility_id: str
    credentials: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)


@dataclass
class Patient:
    id: str
    name: str
    dob: str
    mrn: str                        # Medical Record Number


@dataclass
class Facility:
    id: str
    name: str
    fhir_endpoint: str
    accepts_referrals: bool = True


@dataclass
class Referral:
    id: str
    patient_id: str
    referring_clinician_id: str
    referring_facility_id: str
    receiving_facility_id: str
    reason: str
    priority: str                   # "routine" | "urgent" | "stat"
    status: ReferralStatus = ReferralStatus.DRAFT
    created_at: Optional[datetime.datetime] = None
    submitted_at: Optional[datetime.datetime] = None


@dataclass
class SecureMessage:
    id: str
    referral_id: str
    sender_id: str
    recipient_facility_id: str
    payload_encrypted: bool
    transport_tls: bool
    content: dict


@dataclass
class AuditEvent:
    id: str
    type: str                       # e.g. "referral-created", "consent-checked"
    action: str                     # "C" | "R" | "U" | "D" | "E"
    recorded: datetime.datetime
    outcome: AuditEventOutcome
    agent_id: str                   # clinician / system that performed the action
    patient_id: str
    resource_id: str                # ID of the resource being audited
    details: dict = field(default_factory=dict)


@dataclass
class ConsentRecord:
    patient_id: str
    scope: str
    status: ConsentStatus
    expiry: Optional[datetime.datetime] = None

class ConsentService:
    def check_consent(self, patient_id: str, scope: str,
                      requesting_facility_id: str) -> ConsentRecord: ...
    def revoke_consent(self, patient_id: str, scope: str) -> ConsentRecord: ...
